title: Replace hardcoded Content-Format values with lichen-coap::content_format constants
description: Update rust/lichen-coap/src/client.rs, codec.rs tests, lichen-client, and any other Rust code using literal 60/112 instead of content_format::CBOR or SENML_CBOR per spec/07-transport-app.md and appendix-senml.md. Ensure all tests pass.
